projects.title: Aura Roast — Coffee Shop Identity
projects.description: A complete brand identity for Aura Roast, a specialty coffee roastery. The project encompassed logo design, packaging, stationery, and environmental branding — all rooted in a warm, minimalist aesthetic that speaks to the craft of single-origin coffee.

projects.title: Folio Press — Publishing House Branding
projects.description: Brand identity system for Folio Press, a modern literary publishing house. Designed a sophisticated visual language featuring forest green and gold foil, applied across hardcover books, stationery, and business collateral.

projects.title: Moderne Formen — Exhibition Poster
projects.description: A bold Swiss-inspired typographic poster for a design and typography exhibition. High-contrast geometric composition featuring striking red and black elements, channelling the legacy of International Typographic Style.

projects.title: The Invisible City — Book Cover
projects.description: An artistic reimagining of Italo Calvino's classic. The cover distils the novel's themes of hidden architecture and dream-like urbanism into layered geometric structures dissolving into a hazy amber sky.

projects.title: Element Architects — Social Grid
projects.description: A cohesive 9-post Instagram grid designed for Element Architects. Editorial photography of concrete structures paired with minimalist typography creates a premium brand narrative across every touchpoint.

projects.title: AETERNA — E-Commerce UI
projects.description: A luxury fashion e-commerce interface designed for AETERNA. Sleek dark theme with gold accents, premium product cards, and editorial layout — crafted to elevate the digital shopping experience.
